author: claude

patch.value: Use --all-release-tags --mode replace --item-url-base to rebuild CHANGELOG.md so every historical release is captured with pm item links. Wire CI to assert the committed CHANGELOG.md matches that output.
Auto-generate full-history CHANGELOG.md in CI without duplicates
CHANGELOG.md must be regenerated automatically by CI/CD using pm-changelog itself, covering full release tag history with GitHub-compatible links and no duplicate entries or empty sections.

CHANGELOG.md contains all 22+ historical releases in version-descending order, every closed pm item with a release tag is linked, no duplicate sections, and CI fails if CHANGELOG.md drifts from regeneration.
Provides downstream consumers a trustworthy machine- and human-readable release history that cross-references pm items.
Prevents partial or duplicated changelog regressions like the empty 2026.5.24-12 section.
Committed CHANGELOG.md regenerates deterministically from git tags + pm items and CI gate enforces it.
Discovered gaps in existing CHANGELOG.md during 2026-05-25 readiness audit.

value.author: claude
value.text: Existing CHANGELOG.md is missing 16 of 22 historical releases and contains an empty 2026.5.24-12 section.

value.author: claude
value.text: Use replace mode in CI verification rather than prepend to detect any drift.

value.author: claude
value.text: --all-release-tags mode enables deterministic rebuild from git history when combined with --mode replace.

message: Open feature to drive full-history changelog regeneration into CI

author: claude

patch.value: CHANGELOG.md regenerates deterministically from git tags + pm items with no duplicates; CI gate enforces it
Items now bucket by release: field when matching tag windows; empty windows omitted by default; release.yml runs --mode replace --all-release-tags --check on every release run

message: completed: bucketing fix and CI workflow rewire shipped

patch.value: Full-history CHANGELOG.md is auto-generated and gated in CI without duplicates

author: claude
message: align release field with published tag v2026.05.25
